title: This is the greatest day of my life

script.text: 자막 없이 영화를 볼 수 있는 그날까지
빵 사 먹을 때 연습 안 했어요?
I think I should go to Paris
it's more than a cheese hall
네 오늘 장면 먼저 듣고 오시죠
I mean he's had a crush on her
그래서 이 라울이 원래 가지고 있었던
우리가 이렇게 다 커서 생각을 하면
you don't know how to say
아 근데 저만의 착각일 수 있는 게
all I can think of is you
there's something I got to tell you
there's something I got to tell you
oh there's something I need to tell you
예 근데 루시일이 치고 들어오는 거죠
It's time for a new movie
Are you ready for the name of the movie?
Maybe it's about a train trip
The Korean title is very different
